title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:Mac:kernel-workspace:82416:run:20260404T214351:86053 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/bootstrap...
summary_text: **REJECT** - Kernel本流は「起動時に実multi-agentを実行」していません。`launch` は receipt を書き、`codex success` を ledger に記録するだけで（GLM/専門lane実行なし）、`scheduler_state=claimed` で止まります（[codex-kernel-guard.sh#L534](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L534), [codex-kernel-guard.sh#L535](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L535), [codex-kernel-guard.sh#L536](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L536)）。実測でも `runtime-ledger` は run-driver event 0 件、`status-surface` は active/running 0（`~/.config/kernel/runtime-ledger.json`, `~/.config/kernel/status/runtime-status.json`）。 - GLMは必須ゲートだが、直近runは不成立が混在しています。`27858` は `specialist-provider-evidence-missing`、`53578` は `degraded-specialist-provider-evidence-insufficient`、`82416` のみ healthy（`kernel-runtime-health.sh status-json` 実測）。単一lane/証跡不足で進むrunが多く、合議実行としては不安定です（[kernel-runtime-health.sh#L196](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L196), [kernel-runtime-health.sh#L202](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L202), [kernel-runtime-health.sh#L216](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L216), [kernel-runtime-health.sh#L223](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L223)）。 - Provider実態は「codex+glm+任意specialist（gemini/cursor/copilot）」までで、GrokはKernel本流では未配線です。specialist選定と optional lane 実行対象は3種のみ（[kernel-specialist-picker.sh#L93](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh#L93), [kernel-specialist-picker.sh#L278](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh#L278), [kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh#L51](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh#L51)）。ledger集計でも記録providerは `codex/glm/gemini-cli/cursor-cli/copilot-cli` のみ（`~/.config/kernel/runtime-ledger.json`, `.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json`）。 - モデル指定の観点では、`glm-5.1`/`gemini-3.1` は「設定デフォルト」にはあるが実行証跡は弱いです。GLM lane実測は candidate列（`glm-4.5-air...glm-5.0`）で記録され、Geminiは直近 bridge 実行で失敗多発・モデル固定証跡なし（`/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/state/active-model-lanes.jsonl`）。`run-local-orchestration` 側も `wants-xai=false` 固定で Grok lane は実行対象外（[run-local-orchestration.sh#L614](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L614), [build-agent-matrix.sh#L367](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L367)）。
